title: Security‑native by design (SECaaS)
description: Security as a Service built in from the start: we verify every request and never assume trust (Zero‑Trust). If something goes wrong, access is denied by default and the event is logged (fail closed). Tenant isolation, role-based access, and ML-assisted threat detection.

title: Predictive by default (TPI & signals)
description: Total Performance Intelligence (TPI) and real-time signals: a single, secured source of truth for telemetry, status, and KPIs. Event streaming and processing turn your operations into predictive metrics and alerts.

title: Composable apps & agents (TSM + MCP)
description: Use only the modules you need; pay for what you use (TSM: Tokenized Service Model). Plug-in agents (MCP: Model Context Protocol) extend the platform. Modular apps with clear boundaries.
